positive: Minimalist abstract celestial creature, resembling a fusion of a deep-sea bioluminescent jellyfish and a graceful cosmic nebula. The creature floats centrally, composed of flowing, ethereal ribbons of violet, sapphire blue, and emerald green. It has delicate, symmetrical glowing tendrils that trail outward, creating a strong, elegant silhouette against a deep, monochromatic black background. The style is high-contrast line art mixed with digital watercolor gradients, optimized for a wearable print. Cinematic studio lighting highlights the glowing edges, giving it a sticker-like, pop-art quality. The composition should be highly balanced, suitable for repeating or single placements on clothing.
negative: photorealistic, low contrast, messy, watercolor texture, blurry, noise, watermark, signature, text, artifact, dirty, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cables
